response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and exposure to key technologies like MCP, TypeScript, and cloud platforms, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his education is only a BS without advanced AI credentials.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven leadership in full-stack engineering and technical mentorship across multiple roles
Strong open-source contributions and public speaking on systems design and testing
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years focused on production AI systems or GenAI deployments
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Limited evidence of cloud-native AI system design on AWS/GCP/Azure beyond basic CDK usage

key_factors.factor: BS only, no advanced AI degree
